concept: ** This classic Sudoku puzzle game challenges players to fill a 9x9 grid with digits 1-9, ensuring each number appears only once in every row, column, and 3x3 box. Players interact by tapping a cell and then selecting a number from a virtual keypad, with features like duplicate number highlighting and pencil notes aiding the solving process. The game offers over 5,000 handcrafted puzzles across four difficulty levels (Easy to Expert), with new puzzles updated weekly, alongside daily challenges that reward trophies for consistent play. Progression is marked by completing puzzles, earning trophies, and climbing global leaderboards in both standard and advanced modes like Killer Sudoku or multiplayer tournaments. While the game boasts an ad-free environment, monetization may include in-app purchases for additional hint packs, premium themes, or special puzzle bundles.
name: Sudoku - Brain Puzzle Games
